visuals.title: Compiler Phase Flow with Lexical Analyzer
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Compiler Phase Flow with Lexical Analyzer
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Role of Lexical Analyzer</text>

  <!-- Source Code Input -->
  <rect x="30" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Source Code
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Lexical Analyzer -->
  <rect x="180" y="50" width="150" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="255" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Lexical Analyzer
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Token Stream Output -->
  <rect x="270" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Token Stream
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Source Code to Lexical Analyzer -->
  <path d="M150 80 L180 80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from Lexical Analyzer to Token Stream -->
  <path d="M330 80 L360 80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Functions Section -->
  <rect x="30" y="150" width="360" height="160" fill="#BBDEFB" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Key Functions
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Function 1: Scanning -->
  <rect x="50" y="190" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Scanning
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Function 2: Tokenization -->
  <rect x="170" y="190" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Tokenization
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Function 3: Removing Whitespace -->
  <rect x="290" y="190" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Remove Whitespace
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Function 4: Error Detection -->
  <rect x="110" y="250" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="150" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Error Detection
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Function 5: Symbol Table -->
  <rect x="230" y="250" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="270" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Symbol Table
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>

diagrams.title: Compiler Phase Flow with Lexical Analyzer
